title: carex muricata subsp. virens
intro: Carex muricata subsp. virens, also known as the rock sedge or green-fruited sedge, is a subspecies of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Carex muricata subsp. virens include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, coughs, and skin irritations.
